research_question: In adults and children with idiopathic bronchiectasis, what is the effectiveness of regular inhaled corticosteroids (with or without spacer devices) used in conjunction with standard therapy, compared to standard therapy alone or other interventions, on lung function, symptoms, morbidity, and mortality?
